name: io.github.codespar/mcp-bigdatacorp
description: MCP server for BigDataCorp — Brazilian data enrichment + KYC. CPF / CNPJ / vehicle / property / antifraud datasets. Paired-header auth (AccessToken + TokenId).

environmentVariables.name: BIGDATACORP_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: AccessToken header value from the BigDataCorp dashboard

environmentVariables.name: BIGDATACORP_TOKEN_ID
environmentVariables.description: TokenId header paired with the access token

environmentVariables.name: BIGDATACORP_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: API base URL — defaults to BigDataCorp production. Override for sandbox.
